blockingIssues.description: generateJobId appends randomUUID().slice(0, 4), providing only 16 bits of entropy; this remains collision-prone for burst same-millisecond generation and does not fully satisfy collision-safe ID requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Either add a `bugfix-worker` skill or stop assigning `skillName: bugfix-worker` in mission features to avoid mandatory-skill failures.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review evidence from fix-race-condition-bugs shows Skill invocation failed with `Skill "bugfix-worker" not found`, forcing procedure deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce milestone-scope commit boundaries so bugfix feature commits do not include unrelated `.factory/validation` artifacts from other milestones.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for fix-race-condition-bugs found commit f531b909 included critical-logic user-testing artifacts and `.factory/services.yaml`, outside race-condition fix scope.

rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: reviewer could not establish this as a correctness issue for race-conditions scrutiny output.
